messages.content: Write a one-sentence description of sequence packing for supervised fine-tuning.
Sequence packing concatenates multiple shorter training examples into one fixed-length token block while preserving loss boundaries so GPU time is spent on useful tokens instead of padding.
Why is full-parameter fine-tuning a 27B model memory intensive?
Full-parameter fine-tuning must store trainable weights, gradients, optimizer statistics, activations, and temporary buffers, so optimizer state alone can exceed the memory of a single GPU.
Give a concise recommendation for adapting a large FP8 checkpoint on one H200.
Use PEFT such as LoRA on the FP8 checkpoint, keep the base model frozen, use sequence packing, and validate the packed sequence length with a short smoke run.
